interfaces.name: getHomePageOverview
interfaces.description: Get high-level overview content for the home page including announcements, highlights, and quick tool metadata.

interfaces.name: getAfterSchoolProgramFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the After-School Programs page.

value.description: Day of week value such as 'monday'

interfaces.name: searchAfterSchoolPrograms
interfaces.description: Search and filter after-school programs to display program cards on the After-School Programs page.

max_fee_amount.description: Maximum fee amount to include, e.g., 40

end_time_before.description: Only include programs ending at or before this time, e.g., '4:30 PM'

schedule_days.description: Limit to programs meeting on any of these days, e.g., ['monday','wednesday']

is_favorited.description: Whether the single user has saved this program

interfaces.name: saveAfterSchoolProgramFavorite
interfaces.description: Save/favorite an after-school program from its card.

interfaces.name: getMenuWeeks
interfaces.description: Get list of available menu weeks for the Lunch Menu and Meal Planner week selector.

interfaces.name: getLunchMenuForWeek
interfaces.description: Get the lunch menu for a specific week with optional dietary filters, grouped by day.

interfaces.name: addMealToPlanner
interfaces.description: Add a selected lunch entrée to the Meal Planner for a specific date. Creates the MealPlanWeek automatically if needed.

parameters.name: menuWeekId
parameters.description: MenuWeek.id for which the meal is being planned

parameters.name: menuItemId
parameters.description: MenuItem.id of the entrée being added

interfaces.name: getMealPlanForWeek
interfaces.description: Get the Meal Planner entries for a specific menu week, organized by day.

parameters.name: menuWeekId
parameters.description: MenuWeek.id whose planned meals should be returned

interfaces.name: removeMealFromPlanner
interfaces.description: Remove a meal entry from the Meal Planner.

interfaces.name: getBusRouteFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Bus Routes & Times page.

interfaces.name: searchBusRoutes
interfaces.description: Search bus routes by street name with filters for grade range and arrival time, and sort results.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Street name or keyword, e.g., 'Oak Street'

is_saved.description: Whether this route is already saved in My Routes

interfaces.name: getBusRouteDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details and stop list for a specific bus route.

interfaces.name: saveBusRouteToMyRoutes
interfaces.description: Save a bus route to the single user's My Routes list.

interfaces.name: getMyRoutes
interfaces.description: Get all bus routes saved in the user's My Routes list.

interfaces.name: removeSavedRoute
interfaces.description: Remove a saved bus route from My Routes.

interfaces.name: getCalendarFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the School Calendar page, including audiences and time-of-day ranges.

label.description: Display label such as '1st Grade Families'
Display label such as '5:00 PM–8:00 PM'

interfaces.name: searchCalendarEvents
interfaces.description: Search school calendar events for a given month with audience and time-of-day filters.

is_saved.description: Whether this event is already saved in My Events

interfaces.name: getEventDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific school event.

interfaces.name: saveEventToMyEvents
interfaces.description: Save an event to the single user's My Events list.

interfaces.name: getMyEvents
interfaces.description: Get all events saved in the user's My Events list.

interfaces.name: removeSavedEvent
interfaces.description: Remove an event from the user's My Events list.

interfaces.name: getStaffDirectoryFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Staff Directory page.

interfaces.name: searchStaffDirectory
interfaces.description: Search the staff directory by grade and subject, and sort results.

is_teacher_only.description: If true, limit results to entries where is_teacher = true

interfaces.name: getTeacherProfile
interfaces.description: Get full profile information for a specific staff member, typically a teacher.

interfaces.name: sendTeacherMessage
interfaces.description: Send a message to a teacher via their profile contact form. Creates a TeacherMessage record and marks it as sent.

parameters.name: staffMemberId
parameters.description: StaffMember.id who will receive the message

interfaces.name: getPolicyGradeLevels
interfaces.description: Get available grade levels for Homework & Grading Policies filters.

interfaces.name: getPolicySectionsForGrade
interfaces.description: Get Homework & Grading Policy sections for a specific grade level.

interfaces.name: bookmarkPolicySection
interfaces.description: Bookmark a specific Homework & Grading Policy section for quick access later.

interfaces.name: getMyBookmarks
interfaces.description: Get all bookmarks saved from Homework & Grading Policies and similar pages.

interfaces.name: removeBookmark
interfaces.description: Remove a bookmark from My Bookmarks.

interfaces.name: getSupplyGradeLevels
interfaces.description: Get available grade levels for School Supply Lists and My Supply Checklist.

interfaces.name: getSupplyListForGrade
interfaces.description: Get the school supply list for a specific grade with optional-only and sort options applied.

optional_items_only.description: If true, only show items where is_required = false

interfaces.name: addSupplyItemToChecklist
interfaces.description: Add a supply list item to the user's checklist, creating the checklist for the grade if needed.

parameters.name: supplyItemId
parameters.description: SupplyItem.id to add to the checklist

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Optional quantity; if omitted, defaults to the recommended quantity or 1

interfaces.name: getMySupplyChecklist
interfaces.description: Get the user's supply checklist items, optionally limited to a specific grade.

parameters.name: gradeLevel
parameters.description: Optional grade level filter such as 'second_grade'

interfaces.name: setSupplyChecklistItemPurchased
interfaces.description: Mark a supply checklist item as purchased or not purchased.

parameters.name: isPurchased
parameters.description: True if the item has been purchased

interfaces.name: removeSupplyChecklistItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the user's supply checklist.

interfaces.name: getSummerCampFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Summer Camps page, including months, daily schedules, and fee presets.

label.description: Display label such as '9:00 AM–3:00 PM'

interfaces.name: searchSummerCampSessions
interfaces.description: Search summer camp sessions by month, schedule, and maximum weekly fee.

interfaces.name: getSummerCampSessionDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific summer camp session.

interfaces.name: submitCampInterestForm
interfaces.description: Submit an interest/registration request for a specific camp session.

parameters.name: campSessionId
parameters.description: SummerCampSession.id corresponding to the selected session

parameters.name: preferredSessionLabel
parameters.description: Label of the preferred session week, e.g., 'Week of July 6'

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateMealPlanWeek
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find or create a MealPlanWeek for a given MenuWeek and date range for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateSupplyChecklist
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find or create a SupplyChecklist for a given grade level for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _parseAndCompareTimeStrings
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to parse human-readable time strings like '7:45 AM' and compare them for filtering/sorting.

helperFunctions.name: _toggleSavedState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to handle common save/remove logic for single-user saved entities such as routes, events, and programs.
